description: A controller permits all params or a protected column, letting a user set role/owner fields by adding request params.
body: Failure mode: a controller passes raw params to create/update or calls permit! / permits a column like role or user_id, so a client can supply that attribute and escalate privilege or reassign ownership. Detection signals: params.require(...).permit! or a permit list including role/admin/owner columns; raw params passed to a model; a request setting an unexpected attribute succeeds. Do not permit attributes the user should not control. Safer fallback: permit an explicit allowlist excluding privilege/ownership columns, set those server-side from the authenticated principal, and add a request spec asserting a forbidden attribute from the client is ignored.
